Background: Experimental Generation Euldernan Marksman-Model Golem, AGS-LA41. Served in the Irtos Squad. Original Neural Pattern: Cereya Ewin, Senior Engineer in Eulderna's Autonomous Golem Soldier program. AGS-LA41 was given the nickname Lailah, and was heavily doted on by the squad. Later was reassigned to the Phantom Strikeforce, an all-golem company. Current Status: Presumed Killed in Action.
